frontmatter.title: Foxit PDF Reader Choice Field Use-After-Free Remote Code Execution Vulnerability

pageProps.content:
# Vulnerability

Foxit PDF Reader Choice Field Use-After-Free Remote Code Execution Vulnerability

## Vulnerability Description

This vulnerability allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code on affected installations of Foxit PDF Reader. User interaction is required to exploit this vulnerability in that the target must visit a malicious page or open a malicious file.

The specific flaw exists within the handling of Choice field object. The issue results from the lack of validating the existence of an object prior to performing operations on the object. An attacker can leverage this vulnerability to execute code in the context of the current process.

## CVE ID

ZDI informed that this was a bug collision at the vendor's end

## Vendor

[Foxit](https://www.foxitsoftware.com/)

## Products

-   Foxit PDF Reader (previously named Foxit Reader) - 11.2.1.53537 and earlier
-   Foxit PDF Editor (previously named Foxit PhantomPDF) - 11.2.1.53537, 11.2.2.53575 and all previous 11.x versions, 10.1.8.37795 and earlier

## Disclosure Timeline

-   22 April 2022 - Vulnerability reported to ZDI
-   06 November 2022 - Coordinated public release of advisory

## Credits

Anonymous, Krishnakant Patil and Ashfaq Ansari - HackSys Inc
